hero.hero_overview: Natalia can adapt to any situation
hero.hero_strength:
Natalia excels at ambushing enemies with her stealth and high burst damage.

She has great map control and can easily roam to secure kills.

Her silence skill can shut down squishy or high-skill heroes quickly.
hero.hero_weakness:
Natalia is vulnerable to crowd control effects like stuns and slows.

She struggles in direct team fights due to her low durability.

If her combo fails, she becomes an easy target during cooldowns.

spell.spell_desc:
Why Execute is the Best Spell for Natalia

Finishing Power Natalia is an assassin who relies on bursting down enemies quickly. Execute helps finish off targets who survive her combo with a sliver of HP.

Early Game Kill Pressure It gives her an edge in early 1v1 fights, especially in the side lane, where a well-timed execute can secure first blood or snowball her lead.

hero.hero_overview: Natalia is not the best choice for the Exp Lane, she can dominate squishy heroes using stealth and surprise attacks. Playing her requires skill in movement and quick assassinations, focusing on targeting fragile enemies. If used wisely, she can be a real threat to the enemy team even from the Exp Lane.
hero.hero_strength: Natalia is extremely powerful against heroes who rely on basic attacks and is also strong against slow heroes.
hero.hero_weakness: She is weak against heroes who have strong crowd control abilities or high durability.

spell.spell_desc: Finsh low hp

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Natalia and Helcurt make a deadly duo because both specialize in stealth, burst damage, and ambush tactics. Helcurt Dark Night Falls ultimate blinds all enemies, making it easier for Natalia to roam undetected and assassinate key targets. This synergy ensures that squishy heroes have no time to react, as Natalia strikes from invisibility while Helcurt silences and bursts them down. Additionally, both heroes thrive in chaotic fights, creating confusion and forcing enemies to play defensively. Their combined map pressure makes it difficult for the enemy team to move freely, securing kills and objectives efficiently.

counters.counter_desc:
Yi Sun-shin is a threat to Natalia because his ultimate, Mountain Shocker, reveals all enemies on the map. Since Natalia relies on stealth and surprise attacks, this completely exposes her position, making it difficult for her to roam undetected or set up ambushes. If Yi Sun-shin times his ultimate well, he can prevent Natalia from engaging safely or force her to reposition.

Additionally, Yi Sun-shin has high mobility with his dash and enhanced basic attacks, allowing him to escape or counter Natalia burst. His late-game damage output also makes it risky for Natalia to engage him alone.

dominants.dominant_desc: In the early game, start by taking Roam and immediately upgrading to Rapid Boots. Rush to the bush just below the blue buff, activate your passive, and head straight to the enemy red buff. Use the bush to repeatedly activate your passive and attack the buff continuously. Afterward, rotate to Mid Lane or EXP Lane to secure First Blood and boost your damage early.

emblems.emblem_desc: The Assassin Emblem enhances burst damage and mobility, making it ideal for Natalia. It increases adaptive penetration, allowing her attacks to deal more damage, especially to squishy targets. With Rupture, she gains extra penetration for stronger basic attacks. Master Assassin boosts damage when fighting alone, perfect for her play style. Lethal Ignition inflicts bonus damage after dealing a certain amount of burst damage, helping secure kills. This emblem setup maximizes Natalia assassination potential, making her even deadlier in ambushes and quick eliminations.

equips.equip_desc:
This build maximizes burst damage, mobility, and attack speed, allowing Natalia to eliminate enemies quickly and escape safely.
1. Rapid Boots - Provides high movement speed, helping Natalia roam faster and gank efficiently.
2. Blade of the Heptaseas - Increases physical attack and penetration while enhancing her first basic attack after being unseen, perfect for Natalia  stealth ambushes.
3. Malefic Roar - Boosts physical penetration, making her attacks more effective against armored enemies.
4. Hunter Strike - Grants cooldown reduction, extra damage, and movement speed, helping her chase or escape.
5. Blade of Dispair - Increases damage significantly against low-HP enemies, ensuring quick eliminations.
6. Windtalker - Boosts attack speed, movement speed, and critical chance, improving her sustained damage in fights.

hero.hero_overview: Natalia is a stealth-based assassin in Mobile Legends, excelling at ambushing squishy enemies. Her passive grants invisibility after staying in a bush, enhancing her next basic attack. Claw Dash provides mobility, while Smoke Bomb increases attack speed and grants evasion. Her ultimate, The Hunt, instantly activates stealth and boosts damage. She dominates early and mid-game by eliminating fragile targets but struggles against crowd control and vision-revealing abilities. Ideal builds include Blade of the Heptanesas and Malefic Roar for burst damage. Mastering Natalia requires patience, good map awareness, and precise targeting to outplay enemies and secure kills effectively.
hero.hero_strength: Natalia excels in stealth and ambush, making her one of the best assassins for eliminating squishy targets. Her high burst damage allows her to quickly take down mages and marksmen before they react. With Smoke Bomb, she gains attack speed and evasion, making her hard to counter with basic attacks. Her mobility from Claw Dash and ultimate helps her escape or reposition effectively. She also creates map pressure, forcing enemies to play cautiously. If played well, she can dominate the early and mid-game, securing kills and disrupting the enemy strategy.
hero.hero_weakness: Natalia struggles against crowd control and heroes with vision-revealing abilities, making her easy to counter if detected. She is squishy and vulnerable if caught in a fight without her stealth. Her damage falls off against tanky heroes who can survive her burst. Group fights limit her impact, as enemies can stick together to avoid easy pick-offs. Additionally, she requires good positioning and map awareness a single mistake can leave her exposed. Items like Oracle, Radiant Armor, or Twilight Armor can reduce her effectiveness, making her less dominant in the late game.

data.recommend: Stealth, burst, roam, and dominate with Natalia in Mobile Legends!

spell.spell_desc: Execute deals true damage to a low HP enemy scaling with their missing health. It is highly effective on Natalia allowing her to secure kills if her burst damage is not enough to finish off a target. Since Natalia excels in ambushing squishy heroes Execute ensures they do not escape. It also helps bypass shields and sustain effects making it useful against heroes with lifesteal or healing. However Inspire or Petrify can be better alternatives if you prefer extra attack speed or a way to disable enemies. Execute is best for aggressive kill focused Natalia playstyles.

Berseker's Fury: Boost critical burst damage
Blade of Despair: High physical damage and synergy with Berseker's Fury
Sea Halberd: Reduction of regeneration effects and additional damage to enemies with high HP
Malefic Roar (Optional): High physical penetration, bought this if enemy has high armor

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Natalia works best with heroes with high AOE damage such as Yi Sun-shin and Vexana. She can stay hidden while they poke the enemy, then pounce on targets that get low on HP.

counters.counter_desc: Natalia counters squishy heroes who lack CC and burst like as Novaria and Irithel since they can't stop Natalia's burst damage.

dominants.dominant_desc: Natalia's abilities revolve around stealth, mobility, and burst damage, making her a terrifying force when used correctly.
dominants.dominant_title: Understanding Natalia's Kit: A Symphony of Stealth and Deception

dominants.dominant_desc:
Natalia's playstyle revolves around stealth and surprise attacks. Here's how to maximize her effectiveness:

- Jungle Domination
- Ganking and Ambushes
- Prioritize Targets
- Teamfight Positioning
- Know When to Engage
dominants.dominant_title: Mastering Natalia's Playstyle: The Art of the Ambush

dominants.dominant_desc:
- Practice Your Combos
- Utilize Bushes
- Be Aware of Your Surroundings
- Don't Be Afraid to Retreat
- Have Fun

By understanding Natalia's kit, mastering her playstyle, and choosing the right build, you can unleash the full potential of this silent assassin and dominate the battlefield.

Remember, practice makes perfect. The more you play Natalia, the better you will understand her strengths and weaknesses and the more effective you will become.

emblems.emblem_desc: Emblems are enhancements for Natalia that provide effects as well as bonus attributes.

equips.equip_desc: Natalia is an Assassin has high damage, good gank and strong late game. You can use Natalia for Roam.

hero.hero_overview: Natalia, known as the Bright Claw, is a formidable Assassin hero in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang. She excels at stealth and ambush tactics, making her a terrifying force in the right hands. This overview will delve into her background, abilities, strengths, weaknesses, and strategies for effectively utilizing her in-game.
hero.hero_strength:
Natalia's strength lies in her ability to be a silent, deadly assassin. Here are her key strengths:

- Stealth
- Mobility
- Burst Damage
- Silence
- Jungle Efficiency

These strengths make Natalia a formidable force in the right hands. She can be a game-changer, especially if she can use her stealth to her advantage and pick off key targets.
hero.hero_weakness:
Natalia, while a powerful assassin, has some significant weaknesses that players need to be aware of:

- Visibility
- Squishy
- Limited Teamfight Presence
- Reliance on Camouflage
- Lack of Crowd Control
- Difficulty to Master

These weaknesses mean that Natalia is not a hero for every situation. Players need to be aware of her limitations and use her strategically to maximize her effectiveness.

data.recommend: Learn the art of stealth and burst damage with this comprehensive Natalia guide.

spell.spell_desc: Spells are something that you can utilize in-game to give Natalia an extra skill.

data.title: Natalia Counter relations |Hero Guide
data.video_link: https://akmweb.youngjoygame.com/web/ugc/en/video/24娜塔莉亚Natalia_克制被克制 Counter relations_EN.mp4

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Natalaia can work with nearly any hero due to their capabilities to essentially play "bodyguard". Either finishing off enemies or whittling them down enough for allies to arrive and do the same.

counters.counter_desc: All enemies with either AOE or healing abilities can negate the damage dealt by Natalia. Crowd control effects also do the same but on her mobility instead, leaving her open to damage with her low HP scaling.

dominants.dominant_desc: Take heed of map awareness throughout the match. Locate enemies that can be taken down within current capabilities and never stay in one place. Mobility and fast response is key for allowing allies to farm and push.

Pursue enemies with caution, especially in bushes. Take advantage of wall perspectives from the enemy side to tale advantage of their innate blind spots in the back and on the left hand side due to the slight tilt in the POV in the game. 

Take similar advantage of the basic attack immunity provided by her 2nd skill next to bushes as it allows you to avoid damage and slightly cloak your actions as you have the passive take effect in any nearby bush.

Take down any lone enemies when possible, but always leave a method of disengagement. When in team fights, choose the enemy to engage carefully, ensure that their methods of disengagements such as teleports and crowd control are unavailable.

emblems.emblem_desc: Emblems are suitable for direct instantaneous combat methodlogies, while allowing for damage to still take effect on high defense enemies.

equips.equip_desc:
Boots with Dire Hit takes advantage of innate mobility capabilities, while preserving the potential to whittle down the enemies' health.

Haas' Claws allows for regenerative potential both on the go and for prolonged combat, thereby increasing sustainability while skill cooldowns are on.

The rest of the items take advantage of the innate burst damage archetype while retaining the edge needed to take down enemies in a hit and run playstyle.

hero.hero_overview: Natalia is a great finishing off the backline of the enemy formations, and chasing down individual enemes in the midst of retreat.
hero.hero_strength:
Burst potential is high, though sustainability in prolonged battles without resorting to passives or ultimate is dependent on the item build of the hero.

High mobility and invisibility allows for swift pursuits and precise ambushes.

data.recommend: For those that aim to play with precision, rather than leech off allies.

spell.spell_desc: Best to have on hand to quickly finish a short battle thereby reducing the need to pursue or to finish off enemies with a innately high amount of HP scaling.

data.title: Natalia Troubleshooting

cooperates.cooperate_desc: No hero can really synergize with Natalia, but having a high CC initiator teammate is a good idea

counters.counter_desc: Any squishy Marksman or Mage is just food for Natalia
High CC Burst AOE characters can really hinder Natalia's performance during mid to late game

dominants.dominant_desc:
4 potential starts:
1. Protect hyper from rushers
2. Start mid
3. Start gold
4. Steal buff from enemies
Help with turtle and focus on picking off damage dealers, make sure you don't die during this phase.

If in a losing position, keep targeting the damage dealers if possible and split push.

If in a winning position, keep pressuring the enemies hyper and roam to throw their skills.

emblems.emblem_desc: Highest damage potential for Natalia, making it easier to burst down enemies.
Viable if you want some speed and sustain without losing too much damage.

equips.equip_desc: In the early game, buy Fury hammer to increase penetration, then buy Sky Piercer to kill enemies easily
Make Fury hammer into Heptaseas, then buy Malefic Roar to increase penetration even more
Build Blade of Despair to increase Attack and buy Berserker's fury to increase Crit Damage and Crit Chance (doesn't matter which order)
Any of these can be alternatives to BoD and Berserker's Fury

hero.hero_overview: Throughout the early game, Natalia excels at picking off squishy seperated heroes, thus making her a viable pick in the new meta.
hero.hero_strength:
No Mana, Just check CD and you're good to go
Passive works well to increase rotation speed
Very good at picking off enemies
Good counter for most assassin junglers
Split push potential
hero.hero_weakness:
Very selfish, can't help team fights too much
Forces team to use tankier heroes which will dish out less damage
Squishy, easy to burst down

spell.spell_desc: Best spell to quickly take out tankier enemies and to KS.

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Whenever Natalia has engaged into a fight, she can be vulnerable to opponents, so a tank like Belerick can help her safely escape after dealing damage to the enemies.

counters.counter_desc: Natalia can stealthily and sneakily hunt and take down Hanzo's body after he executes his ultimate ability.

dominants.dominant_desc: Farming should be a priority and do not take many risks early as Natalia is very vulnerable in the beginning. She must build up to fully shine in the late game, so be patience will be a virtue.

emblems.emblem_desc: The easiest and most convenient combination to maximize Natalia's damage on opponents including turret structures.

equips.equip_desc: Blade of the Heptaseas passive will not be broken by farming on creeps. Swift boots along with Windtalker adds a significant attack speed boost. Berserker's Fury along with Windtalker offers a lot of critical chance to critically damage foes. Hunter Strike and Malefic Roar will  help maximize further penetration against tanky opponents, whilst the Hunter Strike can occasionally offer a speed boost after multiple strikes.

hero.hero_overview: A daring hero that is designed to take up a challenge, whoever may be her foe. Her Assassin Instinct passive offers countless ways to tackle lone enemies abruptly. Natalia thrives in bushes and keeping her passive active as much as possible would be wise to optimize her attack potential. Often underlooked as a jungler, she has the skill set to be one. Natalia should prioritize taking the buff that spawns on the EXP lane side first and then rotate her way to the marksman. Red buff is preferred.
hero.hero_strength: Natalia has a strong late game potential. Visiting bushes constantly triggers her passive to help maximize overall damage output. Most creeps are situated near bushes and so her farming across the jungle can go hand in hand while rotating to teammates that are in need of assistance. Her camouflage ability naturally triggered with the passive can help Natalia either escape from danger or hunt down a foe once used masterfully throughout her surroundings. Double dashes allows for poking enemies.
hero.hero_weakness: Natalia's early game is weak. Natalia needs her core items that can boost her naturally high critical chance further to a point where almost every attack is dealt critically. To get the core items will take some time of farming, so it is imperative to play this hero safely in the early game. Natalia does not fare well against tanks especially in the early game.

data.recommend: Beginners to pro. Natalia is welcome to all players. The learning curve is not too high. One must think like a true Assassin to play Natalia well.

spell.spell_desc: Retribution is an essential skill to help with rotating across the jungle and a must skill to help claim the turtle or lord. Reduces farming time in the jungle greatly.
